channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: 1977 Fender Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard Natural — $1,400
item.description:
$1,400 · Good · Arturo Gear Locker

Hello


Everything original except pickup and knobs

No case

Frets are overall low but still playable. Could use a refret. First 4 frets of E string are buzzy, highest frets of G string too. Neck pocket came from factory bit loose so has shims to the sides


Message me to negotiate shipping or request video. Sounds killer

item.title: Greco Flying V 1978 - Black — $1,366.51
item.description:
$1,366.51 · Good · Jon's gear outlet

1978 Greco FVB-600 Flying V Bass (Japan, Black)

Sounds and plays great. There are a few dings and scuffs that are purely superficial, I've tried to take pictures but would be better inspected in person (from previous owners I guess).

Comes with a soft case.

Pick up only.

item.title: Epiphone Thunderbird-IV 1999 - 2020 - Vintage Sunburst — $335
item.description:
$335 · Excellent · Schlottmann Guitars and Music

Played twice with hard case

item.title: Ibanez SR505FL Fretless 5-String Electric Bass Guitar, Black finish, with case — $599.95
item.description:
$599.95 · Very Good · Butler Music

This Korean-crafted in Used Ibanez SR505FL 5 String Electric Bass Guitar Black offers an incredibly smooth, expressive fretless experience. Weighing in at 9 pounds, 4.50 ounces, it is in very good condition with a deep, sleek black finish and comes securely housed in a deluxe hardshell case.

Unparalleled Fretless Versatility

The Ibanez SR505FL offers an incredibly smooth, expressive fretless experience. Weighing in at 9 pounds, 0.55 ounces, it is in very good condition with a deep, sleek black finish and comes securely housed in a deluxe Rockcase hardshell case.

Renowned for its ergonomic comfort, the Korean-made SR series is a favorite among gigging professionals. This model features a contoured, resonant body that naturally balances well whether you are sitting in the studio or standing on stage. Its slim, fast-playing neck makes navigating the fretless fingerboard effortless, allowing for sweeping glissandos, singing "mwah" tones, and precise microtonal intonation.

Professional-Grade Electronics

Equipped with dual split-coil ADX5 soapbar pickups, this bass delivers an extremely wide frequency range with enhanced definition and clarity. The powerful active 3-band EQ provides absolute tonal control, making it easy to dial in everything from thick, warm fundamental lows to a punchy, mid-focused modern sound. The onboard mid-range frequency switch allows you to fine-tune your voice to cut through any live mix.

Condition & Authenticated Details

This classic black Ibanez SR505FL is in very good condition with only light signs of standard play. It has been verified by its distinctive serial number, C421342, which authenticates its premium Korean craftsmanship.

ncluded Accessories  -- Included with this bass is a deluxe Rockcase hardshell case. Built for touring and heavy road use, the heavy-duty case ensures your instrument stays perfectly protected against impacts, temperature changes, and transit wear.

item.title: RABENBERGER L´Albatros 2023 - vintage verte - 4string Hollowbody — $2,358.04
item.description:
$2,358.04 · Very Good · Moe´s Gear Emporium

I am considering whether I actually want to sell this beautiful instrument. It is a hollow-body bass from the renowned Rabenberger workshop. It is number 2 of only three such basses ever made. For further details, please take a look at the photo containing the specifications. It is a real eye-catcher—not to mention its sound and feel. Thanks to the choice of components and the craftsmanship, it is a truly exceptional bass. Please note that this is a private sale; therefore, no returns or warranties are offered.

item.title: Fender Precision Bass - Rosewood neck — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · Michael is Selling:

Pristine Fender Mod Shop Precision bass with rosewood neck with extra pick-guard included. Looks and sounds fantastic.

item.title: Abasi Guitars Parade Masters Series 2024 - Chalk — $4,000
item.description:
$4,000 · Excellent · Beads Entertainment

This a mint bass guitar that been played only a handful of times. It has been in its custom case in a humidity controlled environment.

item.title: Fernandes Bass Japan 1999 Atlas Revival Red — $425
item.description:
$425 · Good · Golden Tone

I’m actually not sure what this model is? Maybe a JDM model only? It has the characteristics of an atlas bass and a revival jazz with p bass pickups? I know it’s a 1999 manufacturing year model. It looks like the tuners have been swapped for sealed tuners. It is a very nice playing and nice sounding bass, very stable, and of course very well made. Everything about this says Japan made but in the late 90’s you’re getting into other factories as well. I see nothing to indicate this being made elsewhere other than Japan but feel free to point to specific evidence if you can prove that otherwise. Also feel free if you know the specific model designation of this to let me know. I have not seen this particular model or configuration before and I haven’t found it in any surrounding years catalogs. Will come in a gig bag.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 4 H with Roasted Maple Fretboard -Black — $2,200
item.description:
$2,200 · Very Good · Michael is Selling:

Very clean 2023 StingRay Special 4H with black hardware, sounds and looks awesome. Love this bass

item.title: Gibson EB-0 Short-Scale SG Bass 1969 Cherry | Kalamazoo Built | Serial #553839 — $2,995
item.description:
$2,995 · Very Good · Ross Graham

Up for sale is a beautiful piece of late-1960s vintage mojo: a 1969 Gibson EB-0 Short-Scale "SG" Bass, hand-made at the legendary Kalamazoo, Michigan factory. Boasting the 6-digit serial number #553839, this instrument is a phenomenal example from the twilight of Gibson's golden era of bass building. True to its late-60s lineage, this headstock features the deeply impressed serial number with no "Made in USA" stamp underneath, marking it as an authentic 1969 production model before the massive structural changes of the 1970s.With its lightweight mahogany body, ultra-fast 30.5" short-scale neck, and unmistakable double-cutaway design, this bass balances perfectly and delivers that legendary, warm, thunderous low-end thump that defined classic 60s and 70s rock.

The Legendary "Mudbucker" Tone

The EB-0 is famous for its massive, high-output Gibson humbucking pickup positioned directly at the base of the neck. Celebrated for its deep, wall-shaking sub-bass frequencies, this pickup provides an absolute powerhouse of low-end warmth. Whether you are chasing authentic 1960s British Blues-Rock tones or looking for a thick, foundational dub-bass groove, this single-pickup giant delivers it effortlessly.

Specifications:

  • Year: 1969
  • Serial Number: #553839 (Impressed on back of headstock, no "Made in USA" stamp)
  • Model: EB-0
  • Factory: Kalamazoo, Michigan, USA
  • Finish: Heritage Cherry Nitrocellulose
  • Scale Length: 30.5" Short Scale
  • Body/Neck Material: Solid Mahogany
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood with Pearloid Dots
  • Electronics: 1 High-Output Neck Humbucker, 1 Volume, 1 Tone

Condition & Originality Note:

This vintage bass is in Very Good condition and performs exactly as it should. The original pickup, volume, and tone pots operate quietly and smoothly. The neck is straight, the truss rod functions perfectly, and the action is comfortably low and dialed-in.It displays honest cosmetic vintage character, including natural lacquer checking and light surface wear accumulated over nearly six decades of life. Crucially, there are absolutely no headstock cracks, neck breaks, or major structural repairs of any kind.

What’s Included:

  • Comes with a hard-shell case

This gorgeous vintage Gibson will be meticulously packed and shipped fully insured with signature tracking required. Please review the photos and feel free to ask any questions before purchasing!

item.title: Sandberg VS-5 MEDIUM Scale (32.5"), Tobacco Burst / Maple *IN STOCK* — $2,499
item.description:
$2,499 · Brand New · BASS CENTRAL

Sandberg VS-5 MEDIUM Scale (32.5")

item.title: Fender Player II Precision Bass Rallye Orange — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Guitar Guys Ohio

Few instruments have shaped the sound of modern bass playing quite like the Precision Bass. Known for its authoritative punch, focused low-end presence and ability to anchor a mix with confidence, it remains a go-to choice for stage and studio professionals worldwide. The Fender Player II Precision Bass builds on that proven formula with a collection of modern refinements designed to meet the demands of today's musicians. At its core is a Player Series Alnico V split-coil pickup that delivers the powerful fundamentals, musical midrange and supportive low-end response that define the P Bass voice, paired with an alder body that keeps the response balanced and resonant. A Modern C maple neck and 9.5"-radius maple fingerboard with rolled edges provide a comfortable, contemporary playing experience, while dependable Fender hardware and a selection of classic and archival finishes complete a bass built to keep pace with modern performance.
Classic Alder Body for Focused Fundamentals and Balanced Response
The Player II Precision Bass is built around an alder body, a classic Fender tonewood prized for its balanced response and ability to let the instrument's core voice shine through. Strong fundamentals, focused low-end presence and clear note definition give the bass the kind of consistency that has made the Precision Bass a trusted choice across genres. Its straightforward design and balanced proportions contribute to a comfortable, familiar playing experience that feels equally at home on stage and in the studio. Finished in gloss polyester, the body combines timeless Fender style with the durability needed to withstand years of regular use.
Modern C Maple Neck With Rolled Fingerboard Edges for Comfortable Playability
The maple neck is carved to Fender’s Modern C profile, offering a comfortable balance of substance and speed that feels immediately familiar in the hands. A satin urethane finish promotes smooth movement up and down the neck, while the maple fingerboard provides bright articulation and a sleek playing surface. Rolled fingerboard edges create a broken-in feel from the first note, while the 9.5" radius and 20 medium-jumbo frets support fluid movement across the entire fingerboard. Together, these refinements enhance comfort without straying from the straightforward playing experience that players have long appreciated about the Precision Bass.
Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Pickup for Punch and Authority
At the heart of the Player II Precision Bass is a Player Series Alnico V split-coil pickup designed to deliver the unmistakable voice that has made the P Bass a cornerstone of modern music. Powerful fundamentals and strong low-end punch provide the foundation, while a focused midrange helps notes remain present and articulate within a mix. The split-coil design also offers hum-canceling performance for dependable operation in a variety of playing environments. With a straightforward master volume and master tone control layout, the Player II Precision Bass places its emphasis on great core tone and intuitive operation rather than endless adjustment.
4-Saddle Bridge and Open-Gear Tuners for Dependable Performance
The Player II Precision Bass pairs traditional Fender hardware with the reliability expected from a modern working instrument. Its adjustable four-saddle bridge with single-groove steel saddles provides solid intonation and consistent note-to-note response, while standard open-gear tuning machines offer smooth adjustment and stable tuning performance. A synthetic bone nut further contributes to tuning consistency and dependable operation. Together, these components create a hardware package built to handle rehearsals, recording sessions and demanding live performances with confidence.
A Precision Bass Built to Meet the Demands of Modern Players
The Fender Player II Precision Bass pairs the authoritative tone, focused response and dependable performance that made the P Bass a favorite among generations of musicians with a collection of modern refinements designed for today's players. Its balanced alder construction, powerful split-coil pickup and enhanced playability create an instrument built to do exactly what great Precision Basses have always done: provide a confident, supportive foundation for the music around it. Straightforward, reliable and unmistakably Fender, the Player II Precision Bass continues a tradition that remains as relevant today as ever.

Weight: 9lbs 0oz
Features

  • Player II Precision Bass delivers authoritative P Bass punch with modern playability

  • Alder body produces balanced resonance with strong fundamentals and lasting sustain

  • 34" scale length provides tight string response and solid low-end definition

  • Modern C maple neck with satin urethane finish promotes fast, comfortable playability

  • 9.5"-radius maple fingerboard with rolled edges offers a smooth feel and bright, articulate response

  • 20 medium-jumbo frets ensure confident playability and precise note articulation across the neck

  • Player Series Alnico V split-coil Precision Bass pickup delivers powerful lows, musical mids and classic P Bass character

  • Master volume and master tone controls make it easy to shape everything from vintage warmth to modern punch

  • 4-saddle standard bridge with single-groove steel saddles supports reliable intonation and sustain

  • Standard open-gear tuners offer reliable tuning stability



Body

  • Body construction: Solidbody

  • Body shape: Precision Bass

  • Body material: Alder

  • Body finish: Gloss polyester

  • Available colors: Black, Aquatone Blue, Hialeah Yellow, Birch Green, Rallye Orange


Neck

  • Neck material: Maple

  • Neck profile: Modern C

  • Neck finish: Satin urethane

  • Neck joint: Bolt-on

  • Scale length: 34"

  • Truss rod: Single-action, head adjust


Fingerboard

  • Fingerboard material: Maple

  • Fingerboard radius: 9.5"

  • Number of frets: 20

  • Inlays: Black dots

  • Nut material: Synthetic bone

  • Nut width: 1.63"


Hardware

  • Bridge: 4-Saddle Standard

  • Tuning machines: Standard open-gear

  • Hardware finish: Nickel/chrome


Electronics

  • Pickup configuration: S

  • Middle pickup: Player Series Alnico V Precision Bass split single-coil

  • Controls: Master volume, master tone

  • Pickup type: Passive


Strings

  • Number of strings: 4

  • String gauge: .045-.105

  • Factory strings: Fender USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel



All instruments are setup to factory spec and inspected before shipping. Player preference may vary and instruments may need additional adjustments to accommodate those preferences. Setups are not applicable for free returns.
We offer the option to upgrade to a Plek setup at a discounted rate when purchasing an instrument. To learn more about Plek, please message us, or call at: 740-522-0277.Plek add-ons are non-refundable once completed. In the event of a return, a refund will be issued minus the cost of the Plek and any other add-on services.

item.title: Dingwall NG2 Adam "Nolly" Getgood Signature 5-String — $1,844.95
item.description:
$1,844.95 · Mint · Brian's Shop

Dingwall Adam "Nolly" Getgood Signature NG2 5-String Bass. Never gigged and hardly even played.

Metallic Black

  • Alder Body
  • Matching Headstock
  • 5-Piece Maple Neck
  • Maple Fretboard
  • 24 Frets
  • Hipshot/Dingwall tuners
  • Hipshot/Dingwall Bridge
  • Smoked Chrome hardware
  • 2x FD-3N Pickups
  • Darkglass Tone Capsule Preamp
  • Master Volume, Quad-tone pickup selector, Darkglass Tone Capsule, active/passive toggle switch
  • Come with Dingwall Padded Gigbag

item.title: Hamer Custom Quad 12-String Bass 1981 | Rare 4-Digit USA Custom Shop | Serial #0426 — $9,495
item.description:
$9,495 · Good · Ross Graham

Up for sale is one of the rarest, most historically significant instruments in the history of rock and roll: a 1981 Hamer Custom Quad 12-String Bass, featuring the highly coveted 4-digit custom shop serial number #0426. Hand-built by a tiny team of master builders in Hamer's original Palatine, Illinois workshop, the Quad represents the absolute genesis of the 12-string bass. Co-designed by Hamer’s Jol Dantzig and Cheap Trick’s Tom Petersson in the late 1970s, these early 4-digit custom instruments are investment-grade masterpieces that almost never hit the open market. This bass delivers a literal wall of sound. Featuring an agile 30.5" short scale length, an incredibly rigid 3-piece stressed maple set neck, and Hamer's iconic split "V" headstock, it provides an effortless, guitar-like playing experience despite its massive acoustic footprint.

The Legendary Quadraphonic Circuit

This bass is armed with Hamer’s revolutionary, studio-grade quadraphonic electronics system. Each of the four string courses utilizes an isolated pickup coil routed to a specialized 5-pin low-impedance XLR output. When utilizing a multi-amp splitter rig, you can send individual strings to entirely separate amplifiers or mixing board channels for unprecedented stereo panning and independent effects shaping. A standard 1/4" mono jack is also onboard for immediate plug-and-play simplicity.

Specifications:

  • Year: 1981
  • Serial Number: #0426 (Stamped cleanly into the wood on the back of the headstock)
  • Model: Custom Quad 12-String Bass
  • Country of Origin: USA (Palatine, IL Custom Shop)
  • Finish: Orange Sunburst
  • Scale Length: 30.5" Short Scale
  • Neck: 3-Piece Stressed Maple Set-Neck
  • Hardware: Original Hamer Sustain-Block Bridge & Mixed Bass/Guitar Tuners

Condition & Originality:

This instrument is in Good vintage condition and is 100% all-original. Crucially, there are absolutely no headstock cracks, neck breaks, or major structural repairs of any kind. All original pots, switches, tuners, hardware, and the complex quadraphonic electronics function perfectly. As a prized vintage instrument that has been played and appreciated for over 40 years, it shows honest cosmetic signs of light handling and beautiful, authentic finish checking that looks incredible. The neck is arrow-straight, the twin truss rods adjust smoothly, and it plays beautifully with low, comfortable action.

What’s Included:

  • Comes with a Hard-shell case

item.title: FENDER - Player II Jazz Bass Rosewood Fingerboard Rallye Orange - 0140480530 — $947.63
item.description:
$947.63 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender sound and style with the Player II Jazz Bass - a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.The Player II Jazz Bass radiates timeless Fender charm but under the hood its primed for todays players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability from the Modern C-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil J bass pickups offer sweet highs growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.Perfect for crafting your own sound the Player II Jazz Bass has the looks tone and feel that only a Fender delivers..
Product code: 0140480530

item.title: FENDER - Made in Japan Traditional 2025 Collection 60s Jazz Bass Rosewood Fingerboard Stardust Pink - 5382100398 — $1,523.12
item.description:
$1,523.12 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The Made in Japan Traditional series was born from the fusion of Fenders traditional instrument-making aesthetics and Japans sophisticated craftsmanship. Fenders authentic DNA is revived with solid Made in Japan quality.

The Made in Japan Traditional 2025 Collection 60s Jazz Bass is a special model based on the Made in Japan Traditional Jazz Bass with a look exclusive to 2025. The Black Pearl and White Pearl models have a special pearl coating on the body and headstock that is exclusive to these products and combined with the gold-colored hardware you can get an even more elegant and refined sense of luxury. The Competition Black / 3-Color Sunburst and Competition 3-Color Sunburst / Aged Natural are not products with the traditional chromatic competition line but rather products that allow you to feel a different angle of Fender-ness from the three lines by blending Fenders representative color 3-Color Sunburst into the body design. Stardust Pink and Stardust Blue are characterized by a color that blends glitter into the pastel colors that are popular these days and are finished with Fenders unique burst. This is a new proposal that can only be made by Fender which has a wide range of colors.

Product specifications include a gloss-finished basswood body. The 9.5-inch radius U-shaped maple neck equipped with 20 vintage-style frets provides the classical playability unique to the Traditional series. The 4-saddle vintage-style bridge and original pickups selected for the Traditional series play a realistic and musical vintage tone. This series reflects solid guitar craftsmanship and a flexible response to the needs of players.

This product is a limited production item for 2025..
Product code: 5382100398

item.title: FENDER - Made in Japan Traditional 2025 Collection 60s Jazz Bass Rosewood Fingerboard Stardust Blue - 5382100399 — $1,523.12
item.description:
$1,523.12 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The Made in Japan Traditional series was born from the fusion of Fenders traditional instrument-making aesthetics and Japans sophisticated craftsmanship. Fenders authentic DNA is revived with solid Made in Japan quality.

The Made in Japan Traditional 2025 Collection 60s Jazz Bass is a special model based on the Made in Japan Traditional Jazz Bass with a look exclusive to 2025. The Black Pearl and White Pearl models have a special pearl coating on the body and headstock that is exclusive to these products and combined with the gold-colored hardware you can get an even more elegant and refined sense of luxury. The Competition Black / 3-Color Sunburst and Competition 3-Color Sunburst / Aged Natural are not products with the traditional chromatic competition line but rather products that allow you to feel a different angle of Fender-ness from the three lines by blending Fenders representative color 3-Color Sunburst into the body design. Stardust Pink and Stardust Blue are characterized by a color that blends glitter into the pastel colors that are popular these days and are finished with Fenders unique burst. This is a new proposal that can only be made by Fender which has a wide range of colors.

Product specifications include a gloss-finished basswood body. The 9.5-inch radius U-shaped maple neck equipped with 20 vintage-style frets provides the classical playability unique to the Traditional series. The 4-saddle vintage-style bridge and original pickups selected for the Traditional series play a realistic and musical vintage tone. This series reflects solid guitar craftsmanship and a flexible response to the needs of players.

This product is a limited production item for 2025..
Product code: 5382100399

item.title: FENDER - Vintera III Early 70s Jazz Bass Rosewood Fingerboard Black - 0149370306 — $1,265.46
item.description:
$1,265.46 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The Fender Vintera III series delivers meticulously crafted vintage recreations that capture the authentic look feel and tone of iconic Fender guitars from the 50s 60s and 70s.The Vintera III Early 70s Jazz Bass features an alder body and maple neck with maple or rosewood fingerboard for classic Fender tone thats full of punch and clarity. The early 70s C-shape maple neck sports binding and block inlays with 7.25 radius maple or rosewood fingerboard and vintage-tall frets. At its heart youll find a pair of vintage-style early 70s single-coil pickups that deliver all the punchy and articulate warm and woody tone that made Fender famous. Other features include a vintage-style 4-saddle bridge for rock-solid intonation and sustain and vintage-style tuning machines for enhanced tuning stability.Embrace the authentic vintage spirit and legendary sound of Vintera III where every detail tells the story..
Product code: 0149370306

item.title: FENDER - Limited Edition American Professional Classic Telecaster featuring the Fender Silent System Rosewood Fingerboard Sonic Blue - 0175040372 — $1,764.41
item.description:
$1,764.41 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The perfect blend of vintage charm and modern performance the American Professional Classic Telecaster.Under the hood vintage-inspired Coastline 63 Telecaster pickups deliver depth punch and sparkle while the sleek Modern C neck provides exceptional comfort and playability. Fender Staggered ClassicGear tuners provide classic looks and precise tuning stability. Boasting custom-faded vintage and signature Fender finishes this professional-grade instrument looks as good as it sounds. For the first time the American Professional Classic Telecaster features the all-new Fender Silent System - a patent pending passive battery-free breakthrough that effectively eliminates single-coil hum without sacrificing a single trace of that pure authentic single-coil tone you know and love. From studio to stage The American Professional Classic Telecaster featuring the Fender Silent System All the soul of a golden-era Fender evolved for todays player..
Product code: 0175040372

item.title: FENDER - Limited Edition American Professional Classic Telecaster featuring the Fender Silent System Maple Fingerboard 3-Color Sunburst - 0175042300 — $1,764.41
item.description:
$1,764.41 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The perfect blend of vintage charm and modern performance the American Professional Classic Telecaster.Under the hood vintage-inspired Coastline 63 Telecaster pickups deliver depth punch and sparkle while the sleek Modern C neck provides exceptional comfort and playability. Fender Staggered ClassicGear tuners provide classic looks and precise tuning stability. From studio to stage The American Professional Classic Telecaster featuring the Fender Silent System All the soul of a golden-era Fender evolved for todays player..

item.title: FENDER - Vintera III Late 60s Precision Bass Maple Fingerboard 3-Color Sunburst - 0149382300 — $1,176.99
item.description:
$1,176.99 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The Fender Vintera III series delivers meticulously crafted vintage recreations that capture the authentic look feel and tone of iconic Fender guitars from the 50s 60s and 70s.The Vintera III Late 60s Precision Bass features an alder body and maple neck with rosewood fingerboard for classic Fender tone thats full of punch and clarity. The late 60s C-shape maple neck with 7.25 radius maple or rosewood fingerboard and vintage-tall frets provides supreme comfort and outstanding feel. At its heart youll find a vintage-style late 60s split-coil pickup that delivers all the punchy and powerful warm and woody tone that made Fender famous. Other features include a vintage-style 4-saddle bridge for rock-solid intonation and sustain and vintage-style lollipop tuning machines for enhanced tuning stability. Embrace the authentic vintage spirit and legendary sound of Vintera III where every detail tells the story..
Product code: 0149382300

item.title: FENDER - 75th Anniversary Player II Precision Bass Rosewood Fingerboard Daphne Blue - 0146470504 — $947.63
item.description:
$947.63 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass - a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm but under the hood its primed for todays players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability from the Modern C-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass pickups offer sweet highs musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.Perfect for crafting your own sound the Player II Precision Bass has the looks tone and feel that only a Fender delivers..
Product code: 0146470504

item.title: SQUIER - Paranormal Precision Bass Thinline SJ Maple Fingerboard Parchment Pickguard Vintage White - 0377111541 — $540.38
item.description:
$540.38 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The Paranormal Precision Bass Thinline SJ reimagines the original Fender bass guitar as a resonant semi-hollow tone machine loaded with an unconventional SJ pickup combination: a Fender-Designed alnico single-coil 51 P Bass pickup in the neck position paired with a Fender-Designed alnico single-coil Jazz Bass pickup at the bridge. Connected through a 3-way blade switch this unique pairing delivers everything from the deep thumping warmth of the original Precision Bass to the focused growling bite of a Jazz Bass and everywhere in between. The thinline semi-hollow body construction adds natural acoustic resonance and reduced weight for enhanced playability. Other player-friendly details include a comfortable C-shaped neck profile a 4-saddle vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles a satin urethane neck finish and vintage-style open-gear tuning machines for smooth accurate tuning..
Product code: 0377111541

item.title: FENDER - Limited Edition Player Fusion Precision Bass HH Ebony Fingerboard Halo Metallic - 0142841312 — $1,205.17
item.description:
$1,205.17 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

Designed for the players redefining what heavy looks like the Fender Limited Edition Fusion Series takes the most iconic silhouettes in guitar history and strips away everything that doesnt serve the riff. High-output humbuckers and noiseless single coils deliver the kind of tonal aggression that sits in a dense down-tuned mix without disappearing. Built for the stage and the studio the Fusion Series is Fender for the generation that plays loud and means it.The P Bass silhouette brings familiar balance and mass to a hard rock context loaded with two high-output humbuckers that push deep tight low end with enough midrange presence to cut through a wall of guitars. A thin Jazz Bass neck profile and 12 radius ebony fingerboard make the Fusion P Bass as fast and accessible as anything in the series..
Product code: 0142841312

item.title: SQUIER - Paranormal Precision Bass Thinline SJ Laurel Fingerboard Parchment Pickguard Olive - 0377110576 — $540.38
item.description:
$540.38 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The Paranormal Precision Bass Thinline SJ reimagines the original Fender bass guitar as a resonant semi-hollow tone machine loaded with an unconventional SJ pickup combination: a Fender-Designed alnico single-coil 51 P Bass pickup in the neck position paired with a Fender-Designed alnico single-coil Jazz Bass pickup at the bridge. Connected through a 3-way blade switch this unique pairing delivers everything from the deep thumping warmth of the original Precision Bass to the focused growling bite of a Jazz Bass and everywhere in between. The thinline semi-hollow body construction adds natural acoustic resonance and reduced weight for enhanced playability. Other player-friendly details include a comfortable C-shaped neck profile a 4-saddle vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles a satin urethane neck finish and vintage-style open-gear tuning machines for smooth accurate tuning..
Product code: 0377110576

item.title: SQUIER - Paranormal Precision Bass Thinline SJ Laurel Fingerboard Black Pickguard 3-Color Sunburst - 0377112500 — $540.38
item.description:
$540.38 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The Paranormal Precision Bass Thinline SJ reimagines the original Fender bass guitar as a resonant semi-hollow tone machine loaded with an unconventional SJ pickup combination: a Fender-Designed alnico single-coil 51 P Bass pickup in the neck position paired with a Fender-Designed alnico single-coil Jazz Bass pickup at the bridge. Connected through a 3-way blade switch this unique pairing delivers everything from the deep thumping warmth of the original Precision Bass to the focused growling bite of a Jazz Bass and everywhere in between. The thinline semi-hollow body construction adds natural acoustic resonance and reduced weight for enhanced playability. Other player-friendly details include a comfortable C-shaped neck profile a 4-saddle vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles a satin urethane neck finish and vintage-style open-gear tuning machines for smooth accurate tuning..
Product code: 0377112500

item.title: FENDER - 75th Anniversary Player II Precision Bass Maple Fingerboard Candy Apple Red - 0146472509 — $947.63
item.description:
$947.63 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass - a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm but under the hood its primed for todays players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability from the Modern C-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass pickups offer sweet highs musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.Perfect for crafting your own sound the Player II Precision Bass has the looks tone and feel that only a Fender delivers..
Product code: 0146472509

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass - a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm but under the hood its primed for todays players. item.title: FENDER - Limited Edition Player Fusion Precision Bass HH Ebony Fingerboard Black - 0142841306 — $1,205.17
item.description:
$1,205.17 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

Designed for the players redefining what heavy looks like the Fender Limited Edition Fusion Series takes the most iconic silhouettes in guitar history and strips away everything that doesnt serve the riff. High-output humbuckers and noiseless single coils deliver the kind of tonal aggression that sits in a dense down-tuned mix without disappearing. Built for the stage and the studio the Fusion Series is Fender for the generation that plays loud and means it.The P Bass silhouette brings familiar balance and mass to a hard rock context loaded with two high-output humbuckers that push deep tight low end with enough midrange presence to cut through a wall of guitars. A thin Jazz Bass neck profile and 12 radius ebony fingerboard make the Fusion P Bass as fast and accessible as anything in the series..
Product code: 0142841306

item.title: FENDER - Limited Edition American Professional Classic Stratocaster featuring the Fender Silent System Rosewood Fingerboard. Daphne Blue - 0175030304 — $1,764.41
item.description:
$1,764.41 · Brand New · MUSIC WORKS

The perfect blend of vintage charm and modern performance the American Professional Classic Stratocaster.Under the hood vintage-inspired Coastline 57 Stratocaster pickups deliver depth punch and sparkle while the sleek Modern C neck provides exceptional comfort and playability. Fender staggered ClassicGear tuners provide classic looks and precise tuning stability. Boasting custom-faded vintage and signature Fender finishes this professional-grade instrument looks as good as it sounds. For the first time the American Professional Classic Stratocaster features the all-new Fender Silent System - a patent pending passive battery-free breakthrough that effectively eliminates single-coil hum without sacrificing a single trace of that pure authentic single-coil tone you know and love. From studio to stage The American Professional Classic Stratocaster featuring the Fender Silent System All the soul of a golden-era Fender evolved for todays player..
Product code: 0175030304

item.title: Chandler Royale 12-String Bass | Owned & Played by Tom Petersson of Cheap Trick — $9,500
item.description:
$9,500 · Excellent · Ross Graham

Attention collectors, players, and Cheap Trick disciples: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to own a Chandler Royale 12-String Bass (Serial #1349) that was personally owned and played by the pioneer of the 12-string bass himself, Tom Petersson of Cheap Trick. [1]In the mid-to-late 1990s, Tom Petersson collaborated directly with master luthier Paul Chandler to solve the structural and sonic limitations of early multi-string designs. The result was the Chandler Royale—widely considered by bass connoisseurs to be the absolute pinnacle of 12-string bass engineering. This specific instrument, Serial #1349, comes directly from that legendary legacy, boasting 100% original components and the jaw-dropping, wall-shaking power pop roar that Tom made famous.

Provenance & Specifications:

  • Serial Number: #1349
  • Original Owner: Personally built for, owned, and played by Tom Petersson (Cheap Trick).
  • Condition: Rated in Very Good vintage condition.
  • Originality: 100% all-original pickups, pots, tuners, and hardware in perfect working order.
  • Playability: Features Tom’s preferred low, comfortable action. The multi-laminated maple neck is reinforced with dual graphite stabilizer rods and an extended neck joint to perfectly handle the immense string tension without bowing or neck dive.

Features & Innovations:

  • The Ultimate 12-String Balance: Built with an ingenious combination of Gotoh GB-7 bass tuners for the fundamental strings and lightweight Chandler guitar tuners for the octaves. This keeps the headstock perfectly balanced on a strap with zero neck dive. [1]
  • Proprietary 8-Saddle Bridge: Allows for ultra-precise intonation across all fundamental and octave pairs, making it effortless to strum massive chords or play articulate lead lines. [1]
  • Three Chandler Super 60 Pickups: Loaded with three passive humbucking soapbars delivering an incredibly wide, hi-fi tonal range spanning crisp guitar twang to bone-rattling sub-bass. [1, 2]
  • Stereo / Mono Capabilities: Wired with multiple outputs. You can run the signal into multiple amplifiers simultaneously (e.g., splitting a dirty guitar amp for "twang" and a clean bass rig for low-end punch), just like Tom does on stage. [1]

Condition Details: As an instrument that was owned and utilized by a touring rock legend, it shows honest cosmetic signs of handling and light player wear, but is structurally flawless. There are absolutely no cracks, breaks, or repairs. The truss rod adjusts smoothly, the frets have exceptional life left, and all pots, switches, and jacks operate perfectly.

What’s Included:

  • Comes with its hard-shell case.

item.title: Vintage Layolo Bass (Made in Italy) - Pearloid Body - Restoration Project — $595.78
item.description:
$595.78 · Non Functioning · WelcomeGuitars.Shop

Up for sale is a rare and striking piece of Italian lutherie history: a vintage Layolo bass. Known for their distinctive style and craftsmanship, this instrument is a true gem for collectors or anyone looking for a unique restoration project.
The bass features the iconic, highly sought-after pearloid celluloid body finish that defines the "Made in Italy" vintage aesthetic.
Condition & Project Details:
This instrument is being sold as a restoration project. It is perfect for a luthier or an enthusiast looking to bring a classic back to life.
Aesthetics: The body features the beautiful original pearloid celluloid covering. The Layolo logo is clearly present on the headstock.
Electronics: The original pickup and electronic components are all present and in working order. They simply require assembly and wiring back into the body.
Pickguard: The original pickguard is missing. However, I am including a technical sheet with the exact original measurements, making it easy for you to have a custom replacement cut and fitted.
Bridge: There is one small piece missing from the bridge assembly. This is a standard component and easily sourceable/replaceable from any vintage guitar parts supplier.


We ship worldwide, consider trade-ins, and offer bargain prices — contact us now!

item.title: Vision JB8 Jazz Bass Starter Kit - Sosft case Jack and 35W Amplifer - Blue - NEW — $177.90
item.description:
$177.90 · Excellent · WelcomeGuitars.Shop

We ship worldwide, consider trade-ins, and offer bargain prices — contact us now!


NEW.


Get everything you need to start laying down the groove! This Vision JB8 Bass Kit is a complete "Plug & Play" package, featuring a classic Jazz Bass design known for its punchy tone and slim, comfortable neck. Unlike standard small starter kits, this bundle includes a powerful 35W amplifier, making it perfect for both home practice and small jam sessions.

The Package Includes:

• Vision JB8 Electric Bass: A classic J-Bass style model with two single-coil pickups. It offers a wide range of tones, from deep, warm lows to bright, funky highs.

• Vision BG45 Bass Amplifier: A solid 35-Watt amp with a dedicated 4nd-band EQ (High, Mid-High, Mid-Low, Low) and a headphone jack for silent practice. It packs much more punch than the standard 10W or 15W amps usually found in kits.

• Padded Gig Bag: To keep your bass safe on the go.

Weight: 3.3 kg

item.title: Roytek Handmade Bass Sunburst – Maple Neck – Excellent Condition – Demo Video — $179.09
item.description:
$179.09 · Excellent · WelcomeGuitars.Shop

We ship worldwide, consider trade-ins, and offer bargain prices — contact us now!

Video demo attached


Roytek Handmade bass in a classic sunburst finish, in excellent condition.


This handcrafted instrument offers great playability and a warm, balanced tone, making it suitable for a wide range of musical styles. The maple neck feels smooth and comfortable, while the alder body provides solid resonance and sustain.


The bass has been well maintained, with frets in excellent condition and fully functional electronics. Cosmetically, it is very well preserved with only minimal signs of use.

Handmade Roytek bass

Finish: Sunburst

Neck: Maple

Frets: Excellent condition

Comfortable playability and balanced tone

item.title: Ibanez GIO Series GSR Bass - Black — $201.78
item.description:
$201.78 · Very Good · WelcomeGuitars.Shop

We ship worldwide, consider trade-ins, and offer bargain prices — contact us now!

Video demo attached


Ibanez GIO GSR Bass – Sleek "All Black" Look & Versatile Tone

Up for sale is a solid, reliable Ibanez GIO series bass in a stunning "all black" finish. This Made in China model is well-known for its comfortable, slim neck and lightweight body, making it the perfect choice for beginners or as a dependable backup for gigging pros.

Key Features & Details:

• Body: Lightweight and contoured for maximum comfort during long playing sessions.

• Finish: Fully black (Black finish, black hardware, black pickups) for a stealthy, modern aesthetic.

• Neck: Slim and fast Ibanez profile, ideal for those who prefer a more agile feel compared to traditional bulky bass necks.

• Pickups: Versatile P/J configuration (Precision-style split coil in the neck and Jazz-style single coil in the bridge). This setup allows you to dial in everything from deep, punchy rock tones to bright, growly jazz sounds.

• Controls: Individual volume knobs for each pickup and a master tone control.


Weight: 3.3 kg

item.title: Fender Justin Meldal-Johnsen Road Worn Signature Mustang Bass Faded Daphne Blue — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Excellent · RC's Stuff for Sale

excellent condition Fender JMJ Mustang 
Bass plays and sounds amazing 
Wearing its original strings and will come with a set of tapes and rounds. (Tapes were on when I traded and I’ve since put original strings back on)
Has new fender padded bag. Very nice. No the cheap flimsy bag they usually use.

item.title: Gibson EB-3 Bass Cherry 1967 | Vintage SG Short-Scale Bass — $3,350
item.description:
$3,350 · Very Good · Ross Graham

Up for sale is a classic piece of rock-and-roll history: a 1967 Gibson EB-3 Electric Bass in its iconic, translucent Heritage Cherry finish. Famously championed by legends like Jack Bruce (Cream) and Andy Fraser (Free), this vintage short-scale powerhouse delivers the undeniable, thunderous low-end and aggressive mid-range growl that defined late-60s British blues-rock. This bass features the highly desirable mid-60s specifications, including the sleek, lightweight solid mahogany SG-style body, a comfortable 30.5" short-scale neck, and the versatile 4-position rotary Varitone switch. Key Specifications:

  • Year: 1967
  • Model: EB-3
  • Finish: Original Mahogany Clear Coat
  • Body/Neck Material: Solid Mahogany
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood with Pearloid Dot Inlays
  • Scale Length: 30.5" (Short Scale)
  • Pickups: Original High-Output Neck Humbucker ("Mudbucker") & Bridge Mini-Humbucker
  • Controls: 2 Volume, 2 Tone, 4-Position Rotary Switch, Front-Mounted Output Jack

Electronics & Tone: The electronics function perfectly. The neck "mudbucker" produces a massive, wall-shaking sub-bass, while the bridge mini-humbucker injects the perfect amount of bite and definitions to cut through a mix. The 4-position rotary switch provides distinct tonal palettes, allowing you to run the pickups individually, in tandem, or with the famous choked-bass filter circuit.

Condition & Originality Note:

  • Hardware & Electronics: All electronics are original and in perfect working order
  • Structural Condition: There are no structural issues with this bass.
  • Cosmetic Wear: This instrument has been played and loved for nearly 60 years. It shows beautiful, authentic lacquer checking, small dings, and natural player wear which only adds to its incredible vintage mojo.
  • Playability: The neck is straight, the truss rod functions as it should, and the frets have plenty of life left. It plays effortlessly with comfortable, low action.

item.title: Hamer cruise bass mahogany Cruise 1984 - Mahogany — $699
item.description:
$699 · Fair · Michaels music

Hamer 1984 cruise bass with hard case

Some dings and scratches,plays well,pickups working,pots clean

Case used and worn but functional

Stickers on it,needs a clean up

item.title: Yamaha TRBX504 TBL, 4-String Electric Bass - Translucent Black — $590.38
item.description:
$590.38 · Brand New · Piano Heritage Inc

Yamaha TRBX504TBL Details

Rest easy that you've made a solid decision getting the Yamaha TRBX504-TBL electric bass guitar!

This sleek-looking, great-sounding bass gives you a comfortable Yamaha body shape and a fast-action bolt-on 5-piece maple/mahogany neck with a smooth-playing rosewood fingerboard. A pair of humbucking pickups delivers hum-free sound while powerful active electronics let you optimize your bass for different playing styles. Factor in the Yamaha TRBX504's solid hardware and thoughtful design, and you've got a great-looking bass that's ready to rock any stage or studio session.

Comfortable body with progressive styling
One look at the Yamaha TRBX504 4-string electric bass, and you know it means business. A deep cutaway gives you clean access to the higher registers for soloing, while the pronounced upper bout provides balance (and looks cool). The 5-piece maple/mahogany neck has a comfortable and fast-playing profile. The TRBX504 sports a precision fitted neck joint that contributes to the instrument's clear, punchy tone. And the straight string pull of the headstock offers improved tuning stability and reduces overtones. You're going to love the way the TRBX504 looks, plays, and feels!

Humbucking pickups deliver massive bass tone
Yamaha loaded the TRBX504 with a pair of custom-designed HHB5 humbucking pickups. These pickups house Alnico V magnets and two pole pieces per string for big, open tone without any hum. On top of amazing pickup tone and performance, the TRBX504 has an extremely versatile set of active electronics so you can be ready for any gig. It starts off with an active/passive switch followed by a 3-band EQ, a balance control, and volume. The EQ lets you sculpt the perfect tone for live gigs and studio sessions. No matter what kind of sound you need, the Yamaha TRBX504 4-string bass can get you there in seconds!

Yamaha quality, through and through
The Yamaha TRBX504 4-string bass is covered by the company's Limited Lifetime Warranty. The Yamaha marque commands respect. They've been making world-class instruments for over a century, and they're supremely confident of the quality of the materials and workmanship that goes into their products.

Features:

  • An extremely versatile 4-string bass for all styles of music
  • Fast-action 5-piece maple/mahogany neck with rosewood fingerboard
  • Comfortable mahogany body with progressive styling and deep cutaways
  • Humbucking pickups give you a universe of great bass tones
  • Audiophile-grade active electronics let you dial in the perfect tone
  • Yamaha Limited Lifetime Warranty

Specs:

  • Number of Strings: 4
  • Left-/Right-handed: Right-handed
  • Body Shape: TRBX
  • Body Material: Mahogany
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
  • Neck Material: 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany
  • Radius: 10"
  • Fingerboard Material: Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Inlay: White Dots
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Nut Width: 1.496"
  • Nut Material: Urea
  • Bridge/Tailpiece: Die-cast with Individual Saddles
  • Tuners: Covered Die-cast
  • Neck Pickup: H5 Alnico V Humbucker
  • Bridge Pickup: H5 Alnico V Humbucker
  • Controls: 1 x master volume, 1 x balance, 3-band Active EQ
  • Switching: 2-way Active/Passive mini-switch
  • Strings: D'Addario, .045-.100

Bring versatility, killer looks, and amazing performance together in a complete package with the TRBX504.

item.title: Sadowsky Metroline - Nirvana Black Transparent Satin — $3,450
item.description:
$3,450 · Excellent · SS

Sadowsky MetroLine 21-Fret Vintage P/J 5-String Bass Guitar - Nirvana Black Transparent Satin, Swamp Ash Body. This is an extremely mint condition Sadowski metro line. Maybe 15 hours on it. Complete with brand new freight lights. I have 3790 into this. Comes with Sadowski case as well. You’re not gonna find a better deal than this one.ONLY 7.83LBS!!!!!
